meaning: n.顾问,<美> (学生的)指导老师
examples: He was their adviser, confidant and confessor.
The media were still sniping at the president's adviser yesterday.
She refused to promote Colin above the low rank of "legal adviser."
Peter Pace as the nation's top military officer and the senior military adviser to the president.
Maples, who oversaw the development of the Windows 95 operating system at Microsoft, is now an adviser.
